_comment_boilerplate_by_design: This template is intentionally boilerplate. All the FHIR plumbing (resource types, codes, systems, references between resources) is already filled in for you. Your mapping only needs to REPLACE the <REPLACE_ME | ... > placeholders with the data-element values from your EMR — do not change anything else. Delete every '_comment_...' line before sending.

resource._comment_optional_name: OPTIONAL: only send name if your site's data-sharing rules permit; DELETE this whole 'name' block if not.

given: <REPLACE_ME | string | from Bahmni: patient given name (OPTIONAL)>

resource.birthDate: <REPLACE_ME | date YYYY-MM-DD | from Bahmni: Patient DOB>

entry._comment_field: REQUIRED: the facility. identifier.value = your site's DHIS2 organisation-unit code from the master facility list.

identifier.value: <REPLACE_ME | string | DHIS2 org-unit code for this Bahmni site (site-configured)>

period.start: <REPLACE_ME | date YYYY-MM-DD | from Bahmni: Date of visit / obsDate>

entry._comment_optional: OPTIONAL: the next scheduled visit. If none, DELETE this whole entry.

period.start: <REPLACE_ME | date YYYY-MM-DD | from Bahmni: Next Date>

entry._comment_scope: VISIT-LEVEL: one per finished Encounter. If you have multiple visits, duplicate this entry per Encounter and update the encounter reference and value.

valueQuantity.value: <REPLACE_ME | integer, REMOVE the surrounding quotes | from Bahmni: Gestational Age (GA)>

entry._comment_scope: PREGNANCY-LEVEL: one per Bundle. Do NOT duplicate per visit.

resource.valueDateTime: <REPLACE_ME | date YYYY-MM-DD | from Bahmni: EDD concept>

entry._comment_scope: PREGNANCY-LEVEL: one per Bundle. Do NOT duplicate per visit.
VISIT-LEVEL: one per finished Encounter. If you have multiple visits, duplicate this entry per Encounter and update the encounter reference and value.

resource.valueInteger: <REPLACE_ME | integer, REMOVE the surrounding quotes | from Bahmni: Visit Number>
